title: melica ciliata subsp. micrantha
intro: Melica ciliata subsp. micrantha is a subspecies of grass commonly known as small-fruited melic grass. It is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Melica ciliata subsp. micrantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
